title: Heptapleurum avene
intro: Heptapleurum avene, also known as the seven-veined tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Araliaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, which may help alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections, wounds, and other inflammatory conditions. The bioactive constituents of Heptapleurum avene include sesquiterpenes, flavonoids, and alkaloids, which contribute to its therapeutic effects. Heptapleurum avene is commonly used to make herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, often used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues.
